segments.text: Therefore,
having been justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: through whom also we have access by faith into this grace in which we stand, and rejoice in hope of the glory of God
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: but we also glory in tribulations, knowing that tribulation produces perseverance
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: and perseverance, character; and character, hope
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now hope does not disappoint, because the love of God has been poured out in our hearts by the Holy Spirit who was given to us
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For when we were still without strength, in due time Christ died for the ungodly
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For scarcely for a righteous man will one die; yet perhaps for a good man someone would even dare to die
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But God demonstrates His own love toward us, in that while we were still sinners, Christ died for us
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Much more then, having now been justified by His blood, we shall be saved from wrath through Him
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For if when we were enemies we were reconciled to God through the death of His Son, much more, having been reconciled, we shall be saved by His life
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And not only that, but we also rejoice in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received the reconciliation
segments.speaker: Paul

verses.title: Death in Adam, Life in Christ

segments.text: Therefore, just as through one man sin entered the world, and death through sin, and thus death spread to all men, because all sinned
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For until the law sin was in the world, but sin is not imputed when there is no law
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Nevertheless death reigned from Adam to Moses, even over those who had not sinned according to the likeness of the transgression of Adam, who is a type of Him who was to come
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But the free gift is not like the offense. For if by the one man's offense many died, much more the grace of God and the gift by the grace of the one Man, Jesus Christ, abounded to many
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And the gift is not like that which came through the one who sinned. For the judgment which came from one offense resulted in condemnation, but the free gift which came from many offenses resulted in justification
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For if by the one man's offense death reigned through the one, much more those who receive abundance of grace and of the gift of righteousness will reign in life through the One, Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Therefore, as through one man's offense judgment came to all men, resulting in condemnation, even so through one Man's righteous act the free gift came to all men, resulting in justification of life
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For as by one man's disobedience many were made sinners, so also by one Man's obedience many will be made righteous
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Moreover the law entered that the offense might abound. But where sin abounded, grace abounded much more
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: so that as sin reigned in death, even so grace might reign through righteousness to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord
segments.speaker: Paul
